name: Hunter Sargent, PLLC

websiteQuality.rationale: Modern custom WordPress theme with responsive viewport meta tag, mobile menu toggle, and media queries; clear repeated 'schedule a meeting' CTAs plus an embedded Calendly booking link (calendly.com/dentonlegacy) and a Contact Form 7 contact form. Local positioning is excellent ('7 generations in Denton', LocalBusiness schema with geo coordinates) and the copyright footer is current (© 2026). Trust signals are decent but soft: flat-fee promise, free consultation, and bar admissions are stated, while no third-party review widgets, badges, or board certifications are visible; several decorative images carry empty alt attributes.

factors.mobileUsability: Viewport meta tag present; dedicated mobile-menu-toggle and responsive @media CSS breakpoints (e.g. 1080px) indicate a mobile-ready layout.
factors.pageSpeed: Not directly measured (no lab tooling). Inference: ~240KB homepage HTML with ~30 script tags is moderately heavy, but the site runs the WP Rocket caching/optimization plugin, suggesting attention to performance; likely acceptable load behavior.
factors.accessibility: Logo and icons have alt text, but a large share of images (44 empty alt attributes observed) are decorative or lack meaningful alt text; form uses standard labeled inputs via Contact Form 7.
factors.visualCredibility: Custom 'dentonlegacy' theme, professional photography, cohesive branding and typography; footer copyright current to 2026.
factors.navigation: Sticky header with clear main navigation, dropdown sub-menus for an extensive practice-area library, and footer links; easy to reach contact and practice pages.
factors.contentClarity: Plain-language, well-organized educational copy on estate and business planning topics; each practice area has a dedicated explanatory page.
factors.callsToAction: Repeated 'schedule a meeting' CTAs above and below the fold, prominent phone number with phone icons, 'contact us now' links inside articles.
factors.contactFormQuality: Dedicated /contact/ page with a Contact Form 7 form (checkbox and hidden fields observed) and an appropriate no-attorney-client-relationship disclaimer.
factors.localPositioning: Very strong: '7 generations in Denton, Texas' messaging throughout, LocalBusiness JSON-LD schema with street address and geo coordinates, Denton-focused headlines.
factors.trustSignals: Flat-fee structure and free initial consultation stated; bar admissions (Texas state courts, U.S. District Court E.D. Tex., U.S. Bankruptcy Court E.D. Tex.), Eagle Scout, and Leadership Denton noted on bio page; no visible review widgets, ratings badges, or board certifications.
factors.appointmentBooking: Online self-scheduling available via Calendly (calendly.com/dentonlegacy) linked from site CTAs, in addition to phone, email, and contact form.

sources.supports: firm name, practice areas, phone (940) 594-7754, address 319 W Oak St Denton TX 76201 (JSON-LD schema), Calendly booking, CTAs, copyright 2026, website quality assessment

attorney Hunter Sargent (founder), firm opened in Denton in 2021, returned to Denton in 2014 to practice law, bar admissions, education (University of Oklahoma, Texas A&M University School of Law), 'seventh generation Dentonite'
Hunter Sargent licensed to practice law in 2014 (yearBeganPractice), office located inside the Alagood, Cartwright, Burke building at 319 W Oak St., Denton, Texas 76201, free initial consultation
